# Code Anchors: Grep-Native Retrieval

- `libs/portable-tools/src/drift-advisory.ts` — reopens community detection but confines it to offline, advisory-only proposals of missing domains, never persisted as page metadata or read as an index, so retrieval stays grep-native.
- `libs/portable-tools/src/generate-atlas.ts` — builds the one derived orientation surface (the atlas) that no tool retrieves through; retrieval remains search, list, and read over the readable pages.
